ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(OwnerId) && IsClosed = TRUE && $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves" && Bypass_Owner_Change_Validation__c = false
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To change the owner for a closed opportunity please reach out to the Sales Ops team
